name: Invoke-Obfuscation COMPRESS OBFUSCATION - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation COMPRESS OBFUSCATION - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated Powershell via COMPRESS OBFUSCATION

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%new-object%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%text.encoding]::ascii%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%readtoend%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%system.io.compression.deflatestream%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%system.io.streamreader%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation COMPRESS OBFUSCATION - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%new-object%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%text.encoding]::ascii%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%readtoend%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%system.io.compression.deflatestream%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%system.io.streamreader%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation COMPRESS OBFUSCATION - Security
